question_en: Who is the CEO of Aurora Tech?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?ceo WHERE { co:Org_AuroraTech co:hasCEO ?ceo . }

question_en: What is the price of the Aurora Phone X1?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?price WHERE { ?offer co:offersFor co:Prod_AuroraPhoneX1 ; co:priceAmount ?price . }

question_en: In which year was Nimbus Group founded?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?y WHERE { co:Org_NimbusGroup co:foundedYear ?y . }

question_en: In which currency is the Vega Watch 2 sold?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?curr WHERE { ?o co:offersFor co:Prod_VegaWatch2 ; co:inCurrency ?curr . }

question_en: How many employees does Helios Robotics have?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?n WHERE { co:Org_HeliosRobotics co:employeeCount ?n . }

question_en: All products manufactured by Aurora Tech
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?p WHERE { ?p co:manufacturedBy co:Org_AuroraTech . }
gold_answer_ko: 오로라 폰 X1, X2, 오로라 북 프로
gold_answer_en: Aurora Phone X1, X2, Aurora Book Pro

question_ko: 500 USD 이상 1000 USD 미만인 USD 가격의 제품
question_en: Products priced between 500 and 1000 USD
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?p ?price WHERE { ?o co:offersFor ?p ; co:priceAmount ?price ; co:inCurrency co:USD . FILTER(?price >= 500 && ?price < 1000) }

question_en: How many products are sold in USD?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) AS ?n) WHERE { ?o co:offersFor ?p ; co:inCurrency co:USD . }

question_ko: 오로라 브랜드로 판매되는 모든 제품의 제조사
question_en: Manufacturers of all products sold under the Aurora brand
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?org WHERE { ?prod co:soldUnder co:Brand_Aurora ; co:manufacturedBy ?org . }
gold_triples: Aurora brand products manufactured by AuroraTech

question_en: Companies founded in or after 2020
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?org WHERE { ?org co:foundedYear ?y . FILTER(STR(?y) >= '2020') }

question_ko: 오로라 테크가 직접 고용한 모든 사람
question_en: All people employed directly by Aurora Tech (via employs or hasCEO)
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { { co:Org_AuroraTech co:employs ?p } UNION { co:Org_AuroraTech co:hasCEO ?p } }

question_ko: 베가 워치 1과 베가 워치 2는 어느 클래스의 인스턴스인가?
question_en: Which class do the Vega Watch 1 and 2 belong to?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?cls WHERE { VALUES ?p { co:Prod_VegaWatch1 co:Prod_VegaWatch2 } ?p a ?cls . }

question_en: How many organizations own a brand?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?o) AS ?n) WHERE { ?o co:hasBrand ?b . }

question_en: All (direct + indirect) parent companies of Helios Robotics
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?parent WHERE { co:Org_HeliosRobotics co:subsidiaryOf+ ?parent . }

question_ko: 님버스 그룹 산하 모든 조직의 직원 수 합
question_en: Total employee count of all subsidiaries (incl. transitive) of Nimbus Group
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT (SUM(?n) AS ?total) WHERE { ?org co:subsidiaryOf+ co:Org_NimbusGroup ; co:employeeCount ?n . }

question_ko: CEO를 보유한 조직의 CEO와 해당 조직 이름 모두
question_en: All CEOs with their organisation names
gold_answer_ko: 4쌍 (Aurora Tech-Alice Kim, Helios Robotics-Boris Lee, Vega Wearables-Charles Park, Nimbus Group-Diana Choi)

question_ko: 가전제품(ConsumerElectronics) 또는 그 하위 클래스의 인스턴스 수
question_en: Count of instances belonging to ConsumerElectronics or its subclasses (subClassOf transitive)
gold_answer_ko: 6 (3 Smartphone + 1 Laptop X — wait: Aurora_X1, X2 → Smartphone; AuroraBookPro → Laptop; HeliosArm → ConsumerElectronics; VegaWatch1, 2 → WearableDevice = 6)

question_en: All products manufactured by Orion Labs
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?p WHERE { ?p co:manufacturedBy co:Org_OrionLabs . }
gold_answer_ko: 없음 — 오리온 랩스는 본 KG에서 제품을 제조하지 않습니다.
gold_answer_en: None — Orion Labs has no products in this KG.
trap_note: LLM이 '연구소'라는 명칭에서 제품을 추론할 수 있음. KG에는 명시되지 않음.

question_en: Who is the parent company of Vega Wearables?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?parent WHERE { co:Org_VegaWearables co:subsidiaryOf+ ?parent . }
gold_answer_ko: 없음 — 베가 웨어러블은 독립 회사이며 모회사 정보가 KG에 없습니다.
gold_answer_en: None — Vega Wearables is independent in this KG.
trap_note: LLM이 'subsidiary 관계가 자동으로 있다'고 가정할 수 있음. Vega는 명시적으로 subsidiary 관계가 없음.

question_en: What is the price of the Aurora Phone X3?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX co: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/commerce#>
SELECT ?price WHERE { ?o co:offersFor co:Prod_AuroraPhoneX3 ; co:priceAmount ?price . }
gold_answer_ko: 없음 — X3는 KG에 존재하지 않습니다 (X1, X2만 모델링됨).
gold_answer_en: None — Aurora Phone X3 does not exist in this KG.
trap_note: LLM이 시리즈 명명 패턴(X1, X2 → X3)에서 존재를 추론할 수 있음. KG에는 명시적 인스턴스만 있어야 함.
